Appearances:
Plaintiff John Stewart Company is present. Represented by Sergei Bokov.
Attorney Francisco Torres appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Jeffrey Chayleston is present.
Attorney Hope L. Greenhill representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem James Watson, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502A, for settlement discussions. ***** This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed. The trial date of MAR-26-2012 is vacated. (501/REQ)
